title: Old Vein Miner
description:
The only VeinMiner for Minecraft 1.4.7
Old VeinMiner brings chain-mining to Minecraft 1.4.7 — a version no other VeinMiner mod supports.
body:
# The only VeinMiner for Minecraft 1.4.7

**Old VeinMiner** brings chain-mining to Minecraft 1.4.7 — a version no other VeinMiner mod supports.

Hold the activation key (`` ` `` by default) and break a block. The entire connected vein is mined instantly, with drops delivered straight to your inventory.

## Features

- **26-directional flood fill** — mines diagonally connected blocks, closest first
- **All mineable blocks** — ores, leaves (with shears), and any connected block type
- **Smart drops** — compacted into stacks, delivered to inventory (overflow drops at feet)
- **Tool durability** — consumed per block, stops if your tool breaks
- **Hunger cost** — proportional to blocks mined (configurable, or disable it)
- **Redstone-aware** — lit and unlit redstone ore treated as the same vein
- **Fully configurable** — max blocks, hunger cost, activation key, drop behavior

## Configuration

Edit `config/ovm.cfg` after first launch:

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `maxBlocks` | 64 | Max blocks mined per operation |
| `hungerPerBlocks` | 32 | Blocks per hunger point (0 = free) |
| `dropsToInventory` | true | Drops go to inventory vs. drop in world |
| `activationKey` | 41 | LWJGL keycode (41 = `` ` ``) |

## Install

1. Install [Minecraft Forge for 1.4.7](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.4.7.html)
2. Drop `ovm-*.jar` into your `mods/` folder
3. Launch the game

## Source
